notes.label: Parallel epoch reset
notes.text: Three rapid fires of the schedule trigger drive three epochs through ReusableTriggerService. Validates the 'Parallel Epoch Deferred Reset' fix (memory key finding 2026-03-02): only the LAST epoch's deferred reset creates a new ready epoch, no phantom epochs in activeEpochs. Validates resetForNextCycle guard `!anyActive` in resetDagWithRerunPattern.
